name: SnapCast
description: A video-first creator dashboard with polished editing flows, fast publishing actions, and strong motion design.

files.name: Full case study
content: SnapCast turns creator workflow chaos into a clean, fast publishing experience.
The product focuses on recording, clip management, and social-ready exports without sacrificing performance.
Built with a responsive Next.js frontend, reusable UI primitives, and a motion layer that feels native instead of flashy.

files.name: TLDR.txt
content: SnapCast gives creators a fast, visually organized way to record and ship content.
The interface emphasizes clarity, timeline control, and export states that feel trustworthy under pressure.
It was designed to balance polish and speed so creators can publish more without adding tool fatigue.

name: Converso
description: An AI learning companion platform that makes coding lessons playful, personal, and easier to stick with.

files.name: Full case study
content: Converso is a fun and modern way to learn coding without getting bored.
Instead of just watching videos, you level up as you complete lessons, earn rewards like points and diamonds, and unlock cool achievements.
The experience leans on game-like progression and colorful teaching states without becoming noisy.

files.name: TLDR.txt
content: Converso is a fun and modern way to learn coding without getting bored.
Instead of just watching videos, you level up as you complete lessons, earn rewards like points and diamonds, and unlock cool achievements.
Think of it like a game, but for learning JavaScript, React, and more.
It's built using Next.js and Tailwind, so everything runs fast and looks clean.

name: PrepWise
description: A focused interview prep workspace with guided prompts, practice loops, and structured feedback.

files.name: Full case study
content: PrepWise helps candidates rehearse technical answers in a calmer, more repeatable way.
It blends prompt coaching, timed drills, and clean review states so practice stays focused instead of overwhelming.
The interface is intentionally minimal, with strong typography and quick transitions to keep attention on the content.

files.name: TLDR.txt
content: PrepWise helps candidates rehearse technical answers in a calmer, more repeatable way.
It blends prompt coaching, timed drills, and clean review states so practice stays focused instead of overwhelming.
The experience is built for deliberate repetition, measurable improvement, and less pre-interview chaos.

name: Bookwise
description: A calm digital library product for organizing notes, highlights, and reading goals.

files.name: Full case study
content: Bookwise gives readers a better way to manage highlights, notes, and reading lists.
The experience prioritizes calm layouts, smart categorization, and quick navigation between books and insights.
It was designed for long-term use, which means clarity, speed, and readable typography mattered more than flashy features.

files.name: TLDR.txt
content: Bookwise gives readers a better way to manage highlights, notes, and reading lists.
The experience prioritizes calm layouts, smart categorization, and quick navigation between books and insights.
The product direction is slower-paced, intentionally readable, and tuned for retention instead of novelty.
